info.description: This page documents the REST APIs that perform Symantec Endpoint Protection Manager operations.
info.title: Symantec Endpoint Protection Manager API Reference

post.summary: Delete groups. A system administrator account is required for this REST API.

parameters.name: domainId
parameters.description: The id of the domain for which the groups needs to be deleted.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Group details

post.summary: Add/Update groups. A system administrator account is required for this REST API.

parameters.name: domainId
parameters.description: The id of the domain for which the groups needs to be created/updated.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Group details

delete.summary: Changes the group node type back to its default value i.e Native for all the groups and temporary for default group and changes the external Reference Id back to null.

get.summary: Get cloud external communication settings for the given group
get.operationId: Get Group Cloud External Communication Settings

put.summary: Update lowbandwidth external communication settings to a given group. The values that are not specified are set to defaults

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: The ID of the group

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The Settings to be used.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Only used internally.

delete.summary: Withdraw a cloud setting from a group.

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: The ID of the group from which the sepm setting needs to be withdrawn.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Only used internally.

200.description: successful operation

204.description: Delete operation success. If the resource did not exist prior to the call, 204 is still returned.

401.description: The current logged in user does not have sufficient rights to execute the web method or user is unauthorized

404.description: The resource reguested was not found

500.description: The web service encountered an error processing the web request

get.summary: Get a cloud Policy from a group.

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: The ID of the group to which the policy is being assigned.

parameters.name: policy_type
parameters.description: The type of the Policy to get.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Only used internally.

put.summary: Assign a cloud policy to a group.

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: The ID of the group to which the policy is being assigned.

parameters.name: policy_type
parameters.description: The type of the policy to assign.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: JSON object containing ID of the policy to be assigned. e.g. {"id":"Policy ID"}

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Only used internally.

delete.summary: Withdraw a cloud policy from a group.

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: The ID of the group from which the policy needs to be withdrawn.

parameters.name: policy_type
parameters.description: The type of the policy to be withdrawn.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Only used internally.

200.description: successful operation

get.summary: Get a cloud Policy from a group.

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: The ID of the group to which the policy is being assigned.

parameters.name: policy_type
parameters.description: The type of the policy to get.

parameters.name: sub_type
parameters.description: The type of the sub policy to get.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Only used internally.

put.summary: Assign a cloud policy with sub type to a group.

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: The ID of the group to which the policy is being assigned.

parameters.name: policy_type
parameters.description: The type of the policy to assign.

parameters.name: sub_type
parameters.description: The type of the sub policy to assign.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: JSON object containing ID of the policy to be assigned. e.g. {"id":"Policy ID"}

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Only used internally.

delete.summary: Withdraw a cloud policy with sub type from a group.

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: The ID of the group from which the policy needs to be withdrawn.

parameters.name: policy_type
parameters.description: The type of the policy to be withdrawn.

parameters.name: sub_type
parameters.description: The type of the sub policy to be withdrawn.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Only used internally.

200.description: successful operation

get.operationId: Get Group Detail From My Company

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: External source

get.summary: Get the group information from its SAEP group ID, this is the equavalance of /api/v1/groups/{groupId} but this api takes external source group ID
get.operationId: Get Group Detail From SAEP Group ID

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: External source

parameters.name: groupId
parameters.description: The SAEP group Id, it has different than the sepm group ID

get.summary: Gets a group list. A system administrator account is required for this REST API.

parameters.name: pageIndex
parameters.description: The index page used for returned results. The default page index is 1.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of results to include on each page. The default is 25.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: The column by which the results are sorted. The default is by name.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Specifies whether the results are in ascending order (ASC) or descending order (DESC).

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: The presentation mode for the results, as a list (default) or as a tree.

parameters.name: fullPathName
parameters.description: The full path name of the group.

200.description: Web service is processed successfully, result is returned

401.description: The current logged in user does not have sufficient rights to execute the web method or user is unauthorized

404.description: The resource reguested was not found

500.description: The web service encountered an error processing the web request

parameters.name: groupId
parameters.description: The ID of the group from which to query group detail

parameters.name: domainId
parameters.description: The ID of the group's domain

200.description: The web service successfully processed the web request and returned a result.

401.description: The user that is currently logged on has insufficient rights to execute the web method, or the user is unauthorized.

500.description: The web service encountered an error while processing the web request.

post.summary: Create a group. A system administrator account is required for this REST API.

parameters.name: groupId
parameters.description: The ID of the parent group. A system administrator account is required for this REST API.

parameters.name: domainId
parameters.description: The ID of the group's domain

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The group configuration to be created.

delete.summary: Delete a specific group. A system administrator account is required for this REST API.

parameters.name: groupId
parameters.description: The ID of the group to be deleted

parameters.name: domainId
parameters.description: The ID of the group's domain

parameters.name: groupId
parameters.description: The ID of the group

parameters.name: domainId
parameters.description: The ID of the group's domain

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The group configurations to be updated.

get.summary: Gets the information about the computers in a specified domain and group. A system administrator account is required for this REST API.

parameters.name: groupId
parameters.description: The ID of the group where the clients are communicating

parameters.name: pageIndex
parameters.description: The index page used for returned results. The default page index is 1.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of results to include on each page. The default is 20.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: The column by which the results are sorted. Possible values are COMPUTER_NAME (Default value), COMPUTER_ID, COMPUTER_DOMAIN_NAME, or DOMAIN_ID.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Specifies whether the results are in ascending order (ASC) or descending order (DESC).

parameters.name: lastUpdate
parameters.description: Indicates when a computer last updated its status. The default value of 0 gets all the results.

parameters.name: os
parameters.description: The list of OS to filter. Possible values are CentOs, Debian, Fedora, MacOSX, Oracle, OSX, RedHat, SUSE, Ubuntu, Win10, Win2K, Win7, Win8, WinEmb7, WinEmb8, WinEmb81, WinFundamental, WinNT, Win2K3, Win2K8, Win2K8R2, WinVista, WinXP, WinXPEmb, WinXPProf64

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: The domain from which to get computer information.

parameters.name: feature
parameters.description: List of features to return opstate information in reduced mode.Possible values are av, mem, fw, ips, tdad

parameters.name: verbose
parameters.description: Returns a reduced set of computer information if true.

200.description: successful operation

put.summary: Assign a Policy to a given location with in a group. Only location specific policies can be assigned to a location.

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: The ID of the group to which the policy is being assigned.

parameters.name: location_id
parameters.description: The ID of the location to which the policy is being assigned. To assign policy to default location, 'default' can also be used instead of location ID.

parameters.name: policy_type
parameters.description: The type of the Policy to assign.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: JSON object containing ID of the policy to be assigned. e.g. {"id":"some GUID"}

get.summary: Return a location independent Policy assigned to a group.

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: The ID of the group from which to query policies.

parameters.name: policy_type
parameters.description: The policy type, which can be lucontent or customips.

put.summary: Assign a location independent Policy to a group.

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: The ID of the group to which the policy is being assigned.

parameters.name: policy_type
parameters.description: The type of the Policy to assign.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: JSON object containing ID of the policy to be assigned. e.g. {"id":"some GUID"}

put.summary: Assign a fingerprint list to a group for system lockdown. A system administrator account is required for this REST API.

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: The ID of the group to which a fingerprint list is being assigned.

parameters.name: fingerprint_id
parameters.description: The ID of the fingerprint list to assign.

200.description: The web service successfully processed the web request and returned a result.

401.description: The user that is currently logged on has insufficient rights to execute the web method, or the user is unauthorized.

409.description: The requested settings conflict with the current settings.

422.description: Unable to process the request because system lockdown is currently disabled, or some file fingerprint lists or file names were already assigned.

423.description: The resource to update is locked and cannot be updated.

500.description: The web service encountered an error while processing the web request.

id.description: Group ID, this is set by SEPM, user can not set it

fullPathName.description: Group full path from the root group, this is set by SEPM, user can not set it

numberOfPhysicalComputers.description: The computer count in this group, this is set by SEPM, user can not set it

numberOfRegisteredUsers.description: The user count in this group, this is set by SEPM, user can not set it

createdBy.description: Admin's ID who created this group, this is set by SEPM, user can not set it

created.description: When this group was created, this is set by SEPM, user can not set it

lastModified.description: When this group was last modified, this is set by SEPM, user can not set it

policySerialNumber.description: Group's policy serial number, this is set by SEPM, user can not set it

customIpsNumber.description: Group's custom IPS policy number, it's not used for now

defaultLocationId.description: Default Location Id for the group, if this group inherits from its parent, it's its non-inherit parent's default location.

domain.description: Domain which this group belongs to

policyInheritanceEnabled.description: Whether this group's policy is inheritated from its parent

externalReferenceId.description: External Referene Id for this group.

inherits.description: Enable or disable the group inheritance

networkWeeklyBandwidthLimitKb.description: network bandwidth, kbytes, allotted to the protection technologies

enablelowconnectivityclient.description: enable low-connectivity for DNC or not

servertype.description: type of private Insight server, either ATP or INSIGHT

failover.description: failover to the Symantec servers if private Insight servers are not available
